deck: Recorded at the Global Digital Health Forum, Jonathan Jackson sits down with Jacaranda Health's co-executive directors Nick Pearson and Sathy Rajasekharan on partnering with Kenya's public health system to improve maternal and newborn care.
seo_description: Jacaranda Health's Nick Pearson and Sathy Rajasekharan on partnering with Kenyan governments to improve maternal and newborn health at scale.
og_description: Jacaranda Health on partnering with Kenya's public health system to improve maternal and newborn care.

pull_quote.text: 80% of mothers in countries like Kenya are delivering in government hospitals. By setting up our own chain of private hospitals, we were having impact, but the opportunity was really with the public health system.
pull_quote.cite: Nick Pearson, on the pivot to government partnership

bullets: From hospitals to the public system: why Jacaranda spun out its maternity business to partner with county governments where most underserved mothers receive care
Prompts, the gestationally specific text platform that lets moms ask questions and routes danger signs to the nearest facility
In-facility mentorship: rebuilding a broken training model so nurse midwives practice and refresh life-saving skills like neonatal resuscitation
Amplifying mothers' voices: turning hundreds of thousands of feedback responses into quality-improvement data for government health managers
Machine learning with a human in the loop: intent classification, confidence scoring, and automated responses for middle-of-the-night danger-sign questions
Communicating a pivot: bringing the board, funders, and the market along when an organization changes direction
Beyond Kenya: early work deploying Prompts in Tanzania and Ghana to support immunization and triage

stats.label: mothers enrolled on Prompts to date, with roughly 100,000 added every month
Kenyan counties Jacaranda works in, reaching about 44% of facility deliveries
hospitals where Jacaranda's solutions are deployed

guests.name: Nick Pearson
guests.role: Founder and co-executive director, who started Jacaranda about 12 years ago as a maternal health service organization.

guests.name: Sathy Rajasekharan
guests.role: Co-executive director who came from clinical research and the Clinton Health Access Initiative to lead the expansion of solutions for government health.
